ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drug_records" (
  "regi_code" TEXT /* Code representing the region of the clinical site */,
  "regi_name" TEXT /* Name of the region or clinical site */,
  "ppnt_id" INTEGER /* Patient ID associated with the treatment */,
  "ppnt_code" TEXT /* Patient code for identification */,
  "drso_id" INTEGER /* Drug source ID representing the origin of the drug */,
  "drso_serial_number" INTEGER /* Serial number for the drug source */,
  "drme_id" INTEGER /* Drug measure ID indicating the specific drug administered */,
  "drme_ocr_utc_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the drug administration in UTC */,
  "drme_dru" REAL /* Amount of drug administered */,
  "drme_tpu" REAL /* Total patient units for the administration */,
  "drme_dmtp_code" TEXT /* Code identifying the drug type */,
  "drme_dmst_code" TEXT /* Code for the drug administration method */,
  "drme_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment cycle */,
  "drme_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment cycle */,
  "drme_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  "adverse_reactions" TEXT /* Any adverse reactions or side effects */,
  "treatment_protocol" TEXT /* Treatment protocol or regimen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ppnt_id", "drme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_records_regi_code FOREIGN KEY ("regi_code") REFERENCES clinical_sites ("regi_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "ppnt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "ppnt_code" TEXT /* Code for the patient to maintain confidentiality */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the patient */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the patient */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the patient */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ppnt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drme_code" TEXT /* Code representing the drug */,
  "drme_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "drme_type" TEXT /* Type of drug (e.g., tablet, injection) */,
  "drug_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the drug */,
  "drug_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the drug */,
  "drug_batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the drug */,
  "drug_interactions" TEXT /* Any drug interactions or contraindications */,
  "mechanism_of_action" TEXT /* Mechanism of action of the drug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_sites" (
  "regi_code" TEXT /* Code representing the region of the clinical site */,
  "regi_name" TEXT /* Name of the region or clinical site */,
  "site_address" TEXT /* Address of the clinical site */,
  "site_city" TEXT /* City of the clinical site */,
  "site_state" TEXT /* State of the clinical site */,
  "site_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the clinical site */,
  "site_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the clinical site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regi_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "staff_role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., doctor, nurse) */,
  "staff_email" TEXT /* Email of the staff member */,
  "staff_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)
column_names: Code representing the region of the clinical site

Mechanism of action of the drug
